case_title: ANA C GAXIOLA VS. CESAR FERNANDO GAXIOLA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 4/22/15. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED MAR-03-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GAXIOLA, CESAR FERNANDO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY GAXIOLA, ANA C AS TO DEFENDANT GAXIOLA, CESAR FERNANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY GAXIOLA, ANA C GAXIOLA, CESAR FERNANDO
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF GAXIOLA, ANA C

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-13-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PARTIES RESOLVED DISPUTE. DEFENDANT WILL DELIVER HANDGUN (TITAN 38) TO LICENSED GUN DEALER BEFORE THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON APRIL 23, 2015 SO PLAINTIFF CAN PICK UP THE HANDGUN. DEFENDANT WILL ALSO NOTIFY PLAINTIFF OF THE NAME OR ADDRESS OF THE GUN DEALER BEFORE THE CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON APRIL 23, 2015. PLAINTIFF AGREE TO RELEASE HER INTEREST IN THE SCOOTER TO DEFENDANT & DEFENDANT WILL OBTAIN & PURPOSE THE NECESSARY PAPERWORK WITH THE DMV", PER PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
